metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4165
metadata.comment:
Rationale: "immunofluorescence and confocal microscopy with antibodies to the GABAAR g2 subunit and antibodies specific to KIF5B (Figure 2A) or KIF5C (Figure 2B) show that a proportion of KIF5 staining colocalized with GABAAR clusters in the neuronal somata and dendrites of cultured hippocampal and cortical neurons (see also Figure S2 for whole images of hippocampal neurons and for labeling of cortical neurons)."

Electron microscopy revealed KIF5C-positive deposits consistently found in the vicinity of postsynaptic membranes and decorating the postsynaptic side of symmetrical type 2 contacts (Figure 2C-2H), defined as inhibitory synapses by double detection of GAD and KIF5 (Figure 2G,H).. Experimental description: M&M: Adult Sprague-Dawley rats

KIF5 immunogold was only performed for KIF5C;
"Gold particles were intensified with HQ silver kit (Nanoprobe) and subsequently gold-toned (Gardiol et al., 1999). Immunoperoxidase methods (Colin et al., 1998) were used for the detection of GAD and KIF5C"

antibody (supplemental data); rabbit anti-KIF5C (Abcam) (WB 1:500, IF 1:100)

checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
